## Summary [SESSION-TEMPLATE-SUMMARY]

This file records a single bounded Weave work session. It captures the objective, source artifacts used, work performed, outputs created, decisions made, unresolved questions, and next-step continuity information. Every meaningful session should preserve enough information that a future session can continue without relying on hidden chat context.
